message:
feat(checkpoint): implement checkpoint restoration

Add restore.go with RestoreFromCheckpoint, RestoreLatest, and
ValidateCheckpoint methods. Supports DryRun mode, layout recreation,
context injection, and git state validation.

- RestoreOptions: Force, SkipGitCheck, InjectContext, DryRun, CustomDirectory
- RestoreResult: SessionName, PanesRestored, ContextInjected, Warnings
- Edge cases: missing directories, session conflicts, empty panes

Closes ntm-33cf
